# Button
<!-- nib-component: v1 | generated: 2026-03-04 | do not edit manually -->

> Triggers an action or event

**Widget type:** `button`
**WAI-ARIA APG:** [button pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/button/)

---

## Anatomy

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `root` | The outer interactive element |
| `label` | The visible text content |
| `leadingIcon` | Optional icon before label |
| `trailingIcon` | Optional icon after label |
| `loadingSpinner` | Shown during loading state |

---

## States

| State | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `default` | Resting state |
| `hover` | Pointer device over element |
| `focused` | Keyboard or programmatic focus (focus ring) |
| `active` | Being pressed |
| `disabled` | Not interactive (aria-disabled) |
| `loading` | Async action in progress (aria-disabled) |

---

## Variants

- `primary` — High-emphasis action, one per view
- `secondary` — Medium-emphasis, supporting action
- `ghost` — Low-emphasis, destructive or tertiary
- `danger` — Destructive actions only
## Sizes

- `sm` — height: 32px, padding-x: 12px, font-size: {font-size.label}
- `md` — height: 40px, padding-x: 16px, font-size: {font-size.body}
- `lg` — height: 48px, padding-x: 20px, font-size: {font-size.body-lg}
## Accessibility

**ARIA role:** `button`
**Focus behavior:** receives-focus
**Focus trap:** No
**Required label:** Yes (visible-text-or-aria-label)
**Touch target minimum:** 44pt iOS / 48dp Android / 24px web

### Keyboard Interaction

| Key | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| `Enter` | Activates the button |
| `Space` | Activates the button |

### ARIA Attributes

- `aria-label`
- `aria-disabled`
- `aria-pressed`

---

## Token Bindings

```json
{
  "root": {
    "default": {
      "background": "color.interactive.default",
      "color": "color.text.inverse",
      "border-radius": "border-radius.md",
      "border-color": "transparent"
    },
    "hover": {
      "background": "color.interactive.hover"
    },
    "focused": {
      "outline-color": "color.border.focus",
      "outline-width": "2px"
    },
    "disabled": {
      "background": "color.interactive.disabled",
      "color": "color.text.tertiary"
    }
  }
}
```
